request.description: Login with email and password. Required: email, password.
Rotate refresh token and get new access token. Required: refresh_token.
Send password reset email for provided account.
Reset password using token from email/phone.
Public registration for sales role. Required: company_name, email, password, phone.
Count users for specific role id.
List users with pagination query params page, limit.
Update user fields. For non-admins only own profile without role changes.
List roles with attached user counts.
List clients with page & size query params (restricted for sales).
List clients owned by current user.
Convert lead into deal with client creation.
List leads assigned to current user.
Update lead status (e.g., new, in_progress, won, lost).
List deals (restricted for sales to own list).
List deals owned by current user.
Change deal status (e.g., new, negotiation, won, lost).
Create document for deal/lead with doc_type.
Upload document file (multipart). Include deal_id, doc_type and file field.
Create document based on lead id and doc_type.
Create document for client and optional deal with extra fields.
Create task for entity (deal/lead/client). Required: title, entity_id, entity_type, assignee_id.
Lead summary grouped by status/source with from,to queries.
Revenue report with totals between dates.
Export revenue as file between dates.
Search chats by query param q.
Get online status for user id.
Create personal chat with members array.
Create group chat with name and members.
List chat messages with limit/offset params.
WebSocket endpoint for live chat. Include Sec-WebSocket-Protocol if needed.
